name: Favorite Caramel Frosting
recipeIngredient: 1/2 cup Butter or margarine, cut into pieces
recipeInstructions:
Recipe by: Southern Living
Preparation Time: 0:15
1. Sprinkle half a cup of sugar in a heavy saucepan and place over medium heat.
2. Cook, stirring constantly, until the sugar melts and forms a light golden brown syrup.
3. In a separate bowl, combine the remaining two and a half cups of sugar, milk, beaten egg, and salt. Stir well to ensure all ingredients are incorporated.
4. Gradually stir in the butter mixture into the hot caramelized sugar. The mixture may lump initially but will become smooth with further cooking.
5. Cook over medium heat, stirring frequently until a candy thermometer registers 230 degrees (about 15 to 20 minutes).
6. Allow the mixture to cool for five minutes before beating it with a wooden spoon to nearly a spreading consistency (about 5 minutes).
7. Spread the frosting on the cooled cake.
Yield: about 2-1/2 cups
